title: Onboarding - Welcome Screen
scenario: Poly Studio splash screen respects phone's light/dark theme setting during app launch
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the splash screen displayed while the app loads.
3. Verify that the splash screen shows the 'Poly Studio' branding.
4. Check the phone's system theme setting (Light/Dark).
5. Verify that the splash screen adapts to match the phone's current light/dark theme setting.
expected: The 'Poly Studio' splash screen is displayed while the app loads and correctly matches the phone's light/dark theme setting.
